items.d: this shows that you have everything in your head at once
items.s: ___, we had a great time and we want to go back one day.
items.hintDe: So sagst du, wenn du alles zusammen betrachtest.

items.d: not sleeping
items.s: It was very dark outside, but the children were still wide ___.
items.hintDe: Du schläfst nicht.

items.d: really wanting to find out about a new thing
items.s: Reading about all these faraway places makes me very ___.
items.hintDe: Du willst unbedingt etwas Neues herausfinden.

items.d: what you think is the best thing to do
items.s: For Holman, travelling was the best ___ of his whole life.
items.hintDe: Das, wofür du dich nach langem Nachdenken entscheidest.

items.d: the time when a plane or train leaves
items.s: The big screen at the airport shows the ___ time of every plane.
items.hintDe: Die Zeit, zu der ein Flugzeug, Bus oder Zug abfährt.

items.d: this shows that a thing is still true
items.s: ___ it was cold, we still had a great time on holiday.
items.hintDe: Damit fügst du einen Teil hinzu, der den Rest überraschend macht.

items.d: a thing that happens to you and that you keep in your head
items.s: And in China he had a very painful ___.
items.hintDe: Etwas, das dir passiert und woran du dich erinnerst.

items.d: somebody who travels to new places to find out about them
items.s: Mary Kingsley is still one of the great female ___ of the 19th century.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der an neue Orte reist, um sie zu erforschen.

items.d: a trip in a plane from one place to a faraway place
items.s: Our ___ to London leaves from gate 12 at 3 p.m.
items.hintDe: Eine Reise im Flugzeug von einem Ort zum anderen.

items.d: a very small and simple home to live in
items.s: Mary lived with the people in their ___ and shared their food.
items.hintDe: Ein ganz kleines, einfaches Zuhause zum Wohnen.

items.d: not able to be done at all
items.s: The room was so noisy all night that it was ___ to close my eyes.
items.hintDe: Es lässt sich überhaupt nicht machen.

items.d: this shows how much time you need to do a thing
items.s: ___ Celia many days to cross the whole country on her journey.
items.hintDe: So sagst du, wie viel Zeit du für etwas brauchst.

items.d: the long way you travel from one place to a place far away
items.s: Holman's first ___ to France was long and lonely.
items.hintDe: Eine lange Reise von einem Ort zu einem anderen, weit entfernten Ort.

items.d: feeling sad because you are all alone
items.s: Holman's first journey to France was ___ because no one near him could speak English.
items.hintDe: Du bist traurig, weil du ganz allein bist.

items.d: when you go to a place on your two feet, not in a car or train
items.s: Holman crossed Zanzibar and Tasmania ___.
items.hintDe: Indem du gehst, nicht mit Auto, Bus oder Zug.

items.d: hurting you very much
items.s: The wasps in China hurt Holman, and it was very ___.
items.hintDe: Es tut dir sehr weh.

items.d: rather, but not very much
items.s: The lake was ___ cold, but after a while it wasn't too bad.
items.hintDe: Eher, aber nicht sehr stark. Hier: ziemlich.

items.d: a short time ago, not long ago
items.s: Your family had a short holiday ___, but it was a really bad journey.
items.hintDe: Vor kurzer Zeit, nicht lange her.

items.d: wanting a drink
items.s: I was really ___, so I asked for a glass of cold water.
items.hintDe: Du möchtest etwas trinken.

provenance.note: carrier needs past form 'became' (irregular, untaught), so the full answer lives in dAnswers; sAnswers stay partial

items.d: to begin to be a thing that you were not before
items.s: Holman loved travelling so much that he wanted to ___ a man of adventure.
items.hintDe: Du fängst an, etwas zu sein, das du vorher nicht warst.

items.d: to do what is good and nice when you are with people
items.s: When we visit a new country, we must ___ well.
items.hintDe: Du verhältst dich gut und höflich.

items.d: to tell people what is bad about a thing they do
items.s: Back in England, Mary ___ the Europeans for what they did in Africa.
items.hintDe: Du sagst Leuten, was an dem, was sie tun, schlecht ist.

items.d: to go over water or a road to where you want to be.
items.s: Celia carried her backpack to ___ a river on her way across the country.
items.hintDe: Du gehst von einer Seite auf die andere Seite.

items.d: to make a car go where you want to go
items.s: After the flight back, she ___ home from the airport in her car.
items.hintDe: Du sitzt im Auto und lenkst es dorthin, wohin du willst.

items.d: to go away from a thing that is not nice
items.s: On a long hot day you cannot ___ the midday sun.
items.hintDe: Du kommst von etwas weg, das du nicht magst.

items.d: to travel into a new place to find out what is there
items.s: Holman loved to ___ the streets of a new city all alone.
items.hintDe: Du reist durch einen neuen Ort, um herauszufinden, was es dort gibt.

provenance.note: bank entry indexes only as the exact phrase 'fix sth.'; bare 'fix' is untaught, so it lives in answers as partial

items.d: to make a thing work again after it breaks
items.s: My dad is good with tools and can ___ anything in our home.
items.hintDe: Du machst eine Sache wieder funktionsfähig, nachdem sie kaputtgeht.

items.d: to travel high up in the sky in a plane
items.s: After a short break in Munich, she will ___ back to London in the afternoon.
items.hintDe: Du reist hoch oben im Himmel mit dem Flugzeug.

items.d: to come very near to a thing
items.s: On her long journey across the country, Celia wanted to ___ nature.
items.hintDe: Du kommst etwas ganz nahe.

items.d: to climb inside and sit down to travel somewhere.
items.s: Celia opens the door and ___ her green car.
items.hintDe: Du steigst ins Auto ein und setzt dich hinein.

items.d: to lose your way so you cannot find where you are
items.s: People often ___ in this big dark forest with no map.
items.hintDe: Du weißt nicht mehr, wo du bist oder wohin du gehen musst.

items.d: to climb out of a train or a bus after you travel in it.
items.s: When she flies back, she ___ the plane at about 3 p.m.
items.hintDe: Du steigst aus dem Bus, dem Zug oder dem Flugzeug aus.

items.d: to climb on a train or a bus so you can travel in it.
items.s: She ___ the plane at 6.50 a.m., before the passengers.
items.hintDe: Du steigst in den Bus, den Zug oder das Flugzeug ein.

items.d: to climb out and come down when you arrive somewhere.
items.s: She drives home and ___ the car at about 5 p.m.

dAnswers.text: to get out of the car

items.hintDe: Du steigst aus dem Auto aus, wenn du ankommst.

items.d: to arrive at a place where you want to be
items.s: She drives fast in the morning so she can ___ the airport in time.
items.hintDe: Du erreichst den Ort, an den du willst.

provenance.note: bank entry indexes only as the exact phrase 'get to know sb./sth.'; bare 'get to know' is untaught (token 'know'), so it lives in answers as partial

items.d: to find out more and more about a place or a friend
items.s: Kate wanted to ___ the area near her new home.
items.hintDe: Du lernst einen Ort oder einen Freund langsam besser kennen.

items.d: when a plane touches the ground at the end of a flight
items.s: After a long flight, the plane ___ at the airport at about 9 a.m.
items.hintDe: Das Flugzeug geht herunter und berührt den Boden.

items.d: to book a table or seat before you come
items.s: I want to ___ for a table for two people at seven o'clock tonight.
items.hintDe: Du buchst einen Tisch oder Platz, bevor du kommst.

items.d: to come and be with friends at a time you both agree on
items.s: Near the end of the journey, Celia is going to ___ with her boyfriend.
items.hintDe: Du kommst mit Freunden zu einer Zeit zusammen, die ihr ausgemacht habt.

items.d: to read a thing well and keep it in your head because it is a big thing
items.s: Please ___ that you have to be at the airport early for your flight.
items.hintDe: Du liest etwas genau und merkst es dir, weil es wichtig ist.

items.d: to tell somebody that you will really do a thing
items.s: I ___ to help you with your homework after school today.
items.hintDe: Du sagst jemandem, dass du etwas wirklich tun wirst.

items.d: to arrive at the place you were going to
items.s: After a long climb up the mountain, they were happy to ___ the hut.
items.hintDe: Du kommst an dem Ort an, zu dem du wolltest.

items.d: to tell people a thing is good so they will try it too
items.s: There's a short way and a long way, but I ___ the long way because it's prettier.
items.hintDe: Du sagst Leuten, dass etwas gut ist, damit sie es auch ausprobieren.

items.d: to pay money so you can have a thing for a short time
items.s: Some people ___ a car to visit more of the country.
items.hintDe: Du zahlst Geld, um etwas für kurze Zeit zu benutzen.

items.d: to travel across the sea on a ship
items.s: Holman was on a ship to ___ across the Atlantic Ocean.
items.hintDe: Du reist über das Meer auf einem Schiff, das der Wind bewegt.

items.d: to leave home and begin a journey
items.s: Celia ___ for work at about 5.30 a.m. while it is still dark outside.
items.hintDe: Du verlässt zu Hause und beginnst eine Reise.

items.d: to spend the night outside under a small cloth home
items.s: On the long journey you ___ at night, far away from any hotel.
items.hintDe: Du verbringst die Nacht draußen unter einem kleinen Stoffdach.

items.d: to feel sick because you are very high up in the mountains
items.s: Very high up in the mountains, some people ___.
items.hintDe: Dir wird hoch oben in den Bergen schlecht.

items.d: when a plane leaves the ground and rises into the sky
items.s: The plane ___ at 7.30 a.m. and climbs up into the sky.
items.hintDe: Das Flugzeug hebt vom Boden ab und steigt in den Himmel.

items.d: to be true in the end
items.s: The Fang people ___ to be quite nice, which surprised Mary.
items.hintDe: Am Ende stellt sich etwas als wahr heraus.

items.d: to spend time making or doing a thing
items.s: Every evening, Celia ___ her blog and posts pictures from the day.
items.hintDe: Du verbringst Zeit damit, etwas zu machen oder zu erstellen.

items.d: somebody who travels to many places
items.s: James Holman was a record ___ who travelled more than anyone before him.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der viele Reisen an viele Orte macht.

items.d: this shows that you are sorry about a thing
items.s: ___, our holiday came to an end and we had to fly home after a week.
items.hintDe: So sagst du, wenn dir etwas leidtut.

items.d: a wild area, a long way from any town, where no people live
items.s: Mary had many dangerous adventures in the ___, a long way from any town.
items.hintDe: Ein wildes Gebiet, weit weg von jeder Stadt, in dem keine Menschen leben.
